name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Direct income support of Rs 6000 per year to small and marginal farmer families, paid in 3 equal installments of Rs 2000 each — transferred directly to bank account. Installments released in April, August, and December. No middlemen. For all farmer families owning cultivable land across India. किसान परिवारों को सालाना 6000 रुपये सीधे बैंक खाते में, कोई बिचौलिया नहीं। हर 4 महीने में 2000 रुपये की किस्त।
benefits: Rs 6000/year paid in 3 installments of Rs 2000 (April, August, December). Money reaches bank account directly from central government. सालाना 6000 रुपये, सीधे बैंक खाते में।
installment_schedule: Installment 1: April-July | Installment 2: August-November | Installment 3: December-March
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Common Service Center (CSC) or apply online at pmkisan.gov.in. You can also apply through your state's agriculture department portal. नजदीकी CSC जाएं या pmkisan.gov.in पर आवेदन करें।

name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme. Free health coverage of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. No premium, no deduction at hospital. Covers pre-existing conditions from day 1. As of September 2024, ALL citizens aged 70+ are eligible regardless of income. मुफ्त स्वास्थ्य बीमा - हर परिवार को सालाना 5 लाख रुपये तक का मुफ्त इलाज। 70 वर्ष और उससे अधिक उम्र के सभी नागरिकों के लिए बिना आय सीमा के पात्र।
benefits: Rs 5 lakh/year coverage per family. Cashless and paperless treatment at 25,000+ empanelled hospitals. Covers all pre-existing conditions. Transport allowance included. 5 लाख का मुफ्त इलाज, कोई पैसा नहीं देना।
hospital_network: 25,000+ government and private hospitals empanelled pan-India
documents_required: Ration Card or any family ID proof
how_to_apply: Call 14555 or visit mera.pmjay.gov.in to check eligibility. Visit nearest CSC, bank, or empanelled hospital to get Ayushman Card. 14555 पर कॉल करें या mera.pmjay.gov.in पर जांचें।

name: National Food Security Act - Ration Card
description: Subsidized food grains under the Public Distribution System. Rice at Rs 3/kg, wheat at Rs 2/kg, coarse grains at Rs 1/kg. Each person gets 5 kg per month. Priority households identified by state governments. Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) families get extra 35 kg at subsidized rates. सस्ता राशन - चावल 3 रुपये, गेहूं 2 रुपये, मोटा अनाज 1 रुपये किलो। प्रति व्यक्ति 5 किलो हर महीने।

priority_categories: PHH (Priority Household) - as per state criteria

benefits: 5 kg food grains per person/month at subsidized rates. AAY families: extra 35 kg at Rs 2-3/kg. राशन दुकान से 5 किलो सस्ता अनाज हर महीने।
documents_required: Aadhaar Card of all family members
how_to_apply: Apply at district food and civil supplies office or state food portal online. Track application at state food department website. जिला खाद्य आपूर्ति कार्यालय में आवेदन करें।

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin
description: Financial assistance to build a pucca house with basic amenities in rural areas. Target: homeless and those living in kutcha/inadequate houses. Extended 2024-2029 with 2 crore additional houses. For farmers, laborers, landless — anyone without adequate housing in village. पक्का मकान बनाने के लिए सरकारी मदद। 2024-2029 में 2 करोड़ और घर। गांव में कच्चे या बिना घर वालों के लिए।
benefits: Rs 1.20 lakh in plains, Rs 1.30 lakh in hilly areas for house construction. Additional Rs 12,000 for toilet under Swachh Bharat (separate scheme). मैदानी इलाकों में 1.20 लाख, पहाड़ी में 1.30 लाख रुपये। शौचालय के लिए अलग से 12,000।
unit_assistance: Rs 1.20 lakh for plain areas, Rs 1.30 lakh for hilly areas
documents_required: SECC 2011 data inclusion proof or BPL certificate
Land documents (if constructing on own land)
how_to_apply: Apply through Gram Panchayat. List is prepared from SECC 2011 data. Contact Gram Sabha or Block Development Office. Check status at pmaygramin.gov.in. ग्राम पंचायत से आवेदन करें। SECC 2011 डेटा से चयन।

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG gas connection to women from poor households to replace unclean cooking fuels. Ujjwala 2.0 (launched 2021) provides deposit-free connections to families not covered previously. As of April 2026, over 10.54 crore connections released. महिलाओं को मुफ्त गैस कनेक्शन। लकड़ी और उपले से खाना बनाना बंद करें। अब तक 10.54 करोड़ से अधिक कनेक्शन।

conditions: No existing LPG connection in household
Not covered under any other LPG scheme

benefits: Free LPG connection, first refill free, stove (hot plate) provided free. No security deposit. Connection is in woman's name. मुफ्त गैस कनेक्शन, पहला रिफिल मुफ्त, चूल्हा भी मुफ्त।
how_to_apply: Visit nearest LPG distributor (Indane, Bharat Gas, HP Gas). Check Ujjwala beneficiary status at pmuy.gov.in. Documents verified by distributor, connection released within 30 days. नजदीकी गैस एजेंसी में जाएं।

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance for farmers against yield loss due to natural calamities — drought, flood, landslide, earthquake, pests/diseases, hailstorm, post-harvest losses (up to 14 days). Notified crops vary by state and season. Premium is very low — farmer pays only 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops. फसल बीमा - बाढ़, सूखा, कीट, ओलावृष्टि से फसल खराब होने पर मुआवजा। सभी किसानों के लिए। प्रीमियम बहुत कम।
benefits: Crop loss compensation based on yield shortfall vs threshold. Premium: 2% Kharif, 1.5% Rabi, 5% commercial/horticultural crops. State and central government pay remaining premium. 2% खरीफ, 1.5% रबी, 5% व्यावसायिक फसलों के लिए।
coverage_scope: Drought, flood, landslides, earthquake, fire, pests/diseases, hailstorm, cyclone, post-harvest losses (up to 14 days after harvest)
loss_assessment: Crop Cutting Experiments (CCEs) at village level; area approach for yield comparison
documents_required: Sowing certificate (बुवाई प्रमाण पत्र) from Village Officer
how_to_apply: Apply through bank (for loanee), CSC, or directly at insurance company office before sowing deadline. Last date to apply: 2 weeks after sowing. बैंक, CSC या बीमा कंपनी में आवेदन करें। बुवाई से पहले या 2 सप्ताह बाद तक।

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child to secure her education and marriage. High interest rate (currently 8.2% per annum, revised quarterly). Tax-free maturity amount. Partial withdrawal allowed for education after 18. Account can be opened at any post office or authorized bank. बेटियों के लिए बचत योजना। 8.2% ब्याज (करोबारी से मुक्त), टैक्स फ्री। 18 वर्ष के बाद पढ़ाई के लिए आंशिक निकासी।

eligibility.girl_age: Birth to 10 years at account opening
eligibility.max_accounts: Two girl children per family (three if first is a girl twin)

benefits: 8.2% interest per annum (revised quarterly, tax-free). Minimum deposit Rs 250/year, maximum Rs 1.5 lakh/year. Maturity at 21 years. 8.2% ब्याज (कर मुक्त), सिर्फ 250 रुपये सालाना से शुरू, 21 साल में परिपक्व।
documents_required: Girl child's birth certificate (जन्म प्रमाण पत्र)
how_to_apply: Visit any post office or authorized bank branch with documents. Fill Form-A. Account activated on first deposit. पोस्ट ऑफिस या बैंक में फॉर्म भरें। पहली जमा पर खाता चालू।

name: MGNREGA
description: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household. Wage rates vary by state — from Rs 200 to Rs 370/day depending on state wage notifications. Work must be provided within 15 days of application, or unemployment allowance is paid. For farmers in off-season, landless laborers, anyone needing work. 100 दिन का रोजगार गारंटी। राज्य के हिसाब से 200-370 रुपये रोज। काम नहीं मिला तो बेरोजगारी भत्ता।
benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment per year at minimum wage of respective state. Wages paid within 15 days of work. Unemployment allowance if work not provided in 15 days. 100 दिन रोजगार, न्यूनतम मजदूरी। काम नहीं मिला तो बेरोजगारी भत्ता।
wage_components: Base wage + Dearness Allowance (DA) revised per state notification
unemployment_allowance: First 30 days: 1/4 of minimum wage. After 30 days: 1/2 of minimum wage
documents_required: Job Card (जॉब कार्ड - apply at Gram Panchayat)
how_to_apply: Apply for Job Card at Gram Panchayat (takes 7-14 days). Once Job Card issued, submit written work demand to Gram Panchayat. Work must be allotted within 15 days. ग्राम पंचायत से जॉब कार्ड बनवाएं, फिर लिखित में काम मांगें।

name: PM Kisan Maandhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers aged 18-40. Monthly contribution of Rs 55-200 based on entry age. After 60, receive Rs 3000/month pension for life. Government matches 50% contribution. Separate from PM-KISAN — can avail both simultaneously. किसान पेंशन योजना। 60 साल के बाद 3000 रुपये महीना। पीएम-किसान के साथ दोनों मिल सकते हैं।
benefits: Rs 3000/month pension after age 60 for life. Spouse gets 50% pension after farmer's death (if spouse is not a pension holder). Government contributes 50% of monthly contribution. 60 साल बाद 3000 रुपये महीना पेंशन।
how_to_apply: Visit nearest CSC or bank branch. Enrollment is auto-linked with PM-KISAN data. Can also enroll at LIC office. नजदीकी CSC या बैंक में आवेदन करें।

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Zero balance bank account for every unbanked adult. 56.77 crore accounts opened as of 2025. Comes with RuPay debit card, Rs 2 lakh accidental insurance, Rs 30,000 life insurance, and overdraft facility up to Rs 10,000 after 6 months of satisfactory operation. बैंक खाता - बिना पैसे का। 56.77 करोड़ खाते खुले। 2 लाख दुर्घटना बीमा, 30,000 जीवन बीमा।

eligibility.age: 10 years and above for RuPay card, adult (18+) for overdraft

benefits: Zero balance account, RuPay debit card (free), Rs 2 lakh accidental death insurance, Rs 30,000 life insurance, overdraft up to Rs 10,000 after 6 months, DBT access. जीरो बैलेंस खाता, मुफ्त RuPay कार्ड, 2 लाख दुर्घटना बीमा, 30,000 जीवन बीमा।

insurance_coverages.overdraft: Up to Rs 10,000 after 6 months satisfactory operation

rupay_card_benefits: Acceptable at all ATMs, POS machines, and online payments across India
documents_required: Aadhaar Card (preferred) or any government ID
how_to_apply: Visit any bank branch or Business Correspondent (Bank Mitra). Fill simple form, account opened same day. No documents needed if Aadhaar provided. कोई भी बैंक या बैंक मित्र से जाएं।

name: PM MUDRA Yojana
description: Collateral-free loans for non-farm small businesses. Three categories: Shishu (up to Rs 50,000), Kishore (Rs 50,000-5 lakh), Tarun (Rs 5-10 lakh). Loans from banks, NBFCs, and MFIs. No income ceiling — anyone with a viable business plan can apply. Can be used for shop, small manufacturing, transport, service businesses. बिना गारंटी लोन। छोटा व्यापार, दुकान, ऑटो, काम शुरू करने के लिए। 50,000 से 10 लाख तक।
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to Rs 10 lakh. Shishu: Rs 0-50K (no collateral, no third-party guarantee). Kishore: Rs 50K-5L. Tarun: Rs 5L-10L. बिना गारंटी 50,000 से 10 लाख तक।

loan_categories.shishu: Up to Rs 50,000 (for micro-enterprises, no collateral)
loan_categories.kishore: Rs 50,000 to Rs 5 lakh (for growing businesses)
loan_categories.tarun: Rs 5 lakh to Rs 10 lakh (for established businesses)

interest_rate: Rates vary by bank/NBFC — typically 8-15% depending on category and creditworthiness. Government does not set interest rate ceiling.
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI. Also apply online at udyamimitra.in or mudra.in. No collateral required for Shishu and Kishore. कोई भी बैंक या mudra.in पर जाएं।

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Guaranteed pension scheme for unorganized sector workers — farmers, laborers, vendors, drivers, domestic workers, etc. Monthly pension Rs 1000-5000 after age 60 based on contribution level. Government co-contributes 50% of contribution for 5 years for those joining before Dec 2025. किसान, मजदूर, दुकानदार - सभी के लिए गारंटीड पेंशन। 60 साल बाद 1000-5000 रुपये महीना।

eligibility.sector: Unorganized sector only (not for government employees or income tax payers)

benefits: Monthly pension Rs 1000-5000 after age 60 based on contribution. Spouse continues to get 50% pension after subscriber's death. Investment returns are not guaranteed but pension amount is guaranteed by government. 60 साल बाद 1000-5000 रुपये पेंशन।
government_co_contribution: 50% of contribution matched for 5 years for eligible subscribers joining before Dec 2025
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank branch where APY is offered. Fill NPS enrollment form with APY details. Age 18-40. बैंक में आवेदन करें।

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance at just Rs 436/year. Rs 2 lakh to nominee in case of death due to any reason (natural or accident). Auto-debited from bank account in June each year. For all eligible persons aged 18-50 with bank account. सिर्फ 436 रुपये साल में 2 लाख का जीवन बीमा। किसी भी कारण से मृत्यु पर 2 लाख।

eligibility.condition: Must have bank account for auto-debit

benefits: Rs 2 lakh life insurance cover at Rs 436/year premium. Claim submitted through bank. Nominee receives amount. बस 436 रुपये में 2 लाख का जीवन बीमा।
premium: Rs 436 per year (auto-debited from bank account in June)
coverage: Rs 2 lakh on death from any cause
documents_required: Bank account with consent for auto-debit of premium
how_to_apply: Enroll at any bank branch. Fill simple form and give auto-debit consent. Age 18-50. बैंक में नामांकन करें।

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance at just Rs 20/year. Rs 2 lakh to nominee in case of accidental death, Rs 1 lakh for partial disability (loss of one limb or eye). Auto-debited from bank account annually. For ages 18-70 — much wider age range than most schemes. सिर्फ 20 रुपये साल में 2 लाख का दुर्घटना बीमा। 70 साल तक के सभी के लिए।
benefits: Rs 2 lakh accidental death cover, Rs 1 lakh partial disability cover (loss of one limb or one eye) at just Rs 20/year. सिर्फ 20 रुपये में 2 लाख का दुर्घटना बीमा।
premium: Rs 20 per year (auto-debited from bank account)

coverage.partial_disability: Rs 1 lakh (loss of one limb or one eye)

how_to_apply: Enroll at any bank branch. Age 18-70. बैंक में नामांकन करें।

name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Gramin
description: Rs 12,000 incentive for construction of individual household toilet in rural areas. Since October 2014, over 11 crore toilets have been built. Communities declared Open Defecation Free (ODF) under this mission. For any rural family without toilet — farmer, laborer, anyone. गांव में शौचालय बनाओ, 12,000 रुपये पाओ। 11 करोड़ से अधिक शौचालय बने।

eligibility.condition: Household without toilet in rural area

benefits: Rs 12,000 incentive for toilet construction (directly to beneficiary's bank account via DBT). Incentive amount transferred in 2 installments after construction verification. शौचालय बनाने पर 12,000 रुपये सीधे बैंक खाते में।
incentive_breakdown: Rs 12,000 total paid in installments after toilet construction and verification by Gram Panchayat
documents_required: Gram Panchayat verification of household without toilet
how_to_apply: Apply through Gram Panchayat. After toilet construction, submit photo to Gram Panchayat. Verification done, then Rs 12,000 transferred to bank. ग्राम पंचायत में आवेदन करें।

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Free soil testing and health card for farmers with crop-wise fertilizer recommendations. Soil Health Card issued every 2 years showing NPK and micronutrient status of their land. Recommendations help reduce fertilizer costs by 20-25% and increase yield. All farmers eligible across all states. मिट्टी जांच मुफ्त, हर 2 साल में कार्ड। खाद की सलाह - लागत 20-25% कम और पैदावार बढ़ाएं।
benefits: Free soil testing every 2 years. Soil Health Card with NPK status and crop-wise fertilizer recommendation. Reduces fertilizer cost 20-25% and improves yield. हर 2 साल में मुफ्त मिट्टी जांच, फसलानुसार खाद सलाह।
card_frequency: Issued once every 2 years per farmer
parameters_tested: N, P, K (nitrogen, phosphorus, potassium) + micronutrients (Zinc, Iron, Manganese, etc.) + pH level
documents_required: Farmer's mobile number for SMS alerts
how_to_apply: Contact nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK), block agriculture office, or state agriculture department. Soil sample collected from farmer's field, tested at lab. KVK या कृषि विभाग से संपर्क करें।

name: PM Matru Vandana Yojana
description: Cash incentive of Rs 5000 for pregnant and lactating women for first living child. Paid in 3 installments: first on pregnancy registration, second after 6 months pregnancy (first ultrasound), third after child birth and registration. For all pregnant women — farmer wives, laborer wives, any woman. गर्भवती महिलाओं को 5000 रुपये, पहले बच्चे के लिए। तीन किस्तों में।

eligibility.child_order: First living child only (not for second child onwards)

benefits: Rs 5000 in 3 installments for first child only. Installment 1: Rs 1000 on pregnancy registration. Installment 2: Rs 1000 after 6 months (first antenatal check-up). Installment 3: Rs 3000 after child birth and MCP card registration. पहले बच्चे के लिए 5000 रुपये, 3 किस्तों में।

installment_structure.installment_1: Rs 1000 on pregnancy registration at Anganwadi/ASHA
installment_structure.installment_2: Rs 1000 after 6 months pregnancy (first ultrasound/antenatal check)
installment_structure.installment_3: Rs 3000 after child birth and MCP card registration with ASHA/ANM

documents_required: MCP (Mother and Child Protection) card from ASHA/ANM
how_to_apply: Register at nearest Anganwadi center or sub-health center with ASHA/ANM. ASHA helps with registration. After registration, amount transferred to bank account. नजदीकी आंगनवाड़ी में नाम लिखवाएं।

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: Central and state government scholarships for students from economically weaker families — from Class 1 to PhD level. Over 20 lakh scholarships disbursed annually. Post-matric scholarships for SC/ST/OBC and minority students. For children of farmers, laborers, and economically weak families. पढ़ाई के लिए छात्रवृत्ति - कक्षा 1 से PhD तक। गरीब परिवारों के बच्चों के लिए।
benefits: Scholarships range from Rs 500/month to Rs 20,000/month depending on level (school, college, PhD) and scheme type. Includes tuition fee, maintenance allowance, book grant. 500 से 20,000 रुपये महीना छात्रवृत्ति।
how_to_apply: Apply online at scholarships.gov.in. Multiple schemes listed — filter by category, state, level. Track application status online. scholarships.gov.in पर ऑनलाइन आवेदन करें।

name: Stand Up India
description: Bank loans from Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up new businesses in manufacturing, services, or trading. 75% of project cost covered by loan. For women from farmer families, SC/ST families wanting to start enterprises. महिलाओं और SC/ST के लिए 10 लाख से 1 करोड़ तक का व्यापार लोन।

eligibility.entity_type: For setting up new manufacturing, services, or trading enterprises (not for agriculture)

benefits: Composite loan Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore covering up to 75% of project cost. Repayment tenure up to 7 years. Interest subsidy not provided — rate as per bank norms. 10 लाख से 1 करोड़ का लोन।
loan_range: Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore per enterprise
project_coverage: Loan covers up to 75% of total project cost
how_to_apply: Apply at any scheduled commercial bank branch. Also apply through standupmitra.in portal. Bank sanctions based on business viability. बैंक में आवेदन करें।

name: Kisan Credit Card
description: Timely credit for agriculture and allied activities at subsidized interest. Effective interest rate 4% per annum (2% interest subvention by government + 3% prompt repayment bonus). Credit limit based on land holdings and cropping pattern.ATM-enabled RuPay card for withdrawals. Also covers fisheries and animal husbandry. किसान क्रेडिट कार्ड - 4% ब्याज पर लोन। ATM कार्ड, खेती और पशुपालन दोनों के लिए।
benefits: Credit at 4% effective interest rate (with prompt repayment). ATM-enabled RuPay card. Crop insurance included. Limit: up to Rs 3 lakh (being increased to Rs 5 lakh). 4% ब्याज, ATM कार्ड, फसल बीमा।
interest_rate: 4% effective (2% govt subvention + 3% prompt repayment bonus on Rs 3 lakh limit)
loan_limit: Up to Rs 3 lakh (being increased to Rs 5 lakh per Union Budget 2025-26)
card_features: Insurance coverage for crops and assets
documents_required: Land records (खसरा/खतौनी) or record of rights
Crop details and area under cultivation
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank branch with land documents. Credit limit fixed based on land area, cropping pattern, and farm income. Can also apply through online banking. बैंक में आवेदन करें।

name: PM Vishwakarma
description: New scheme launched in September 2023 for traditional artisans and craftspeople — carpenters, blacksmiths, potters, weavers, tailors, cobblers, stone carvers, etc. Provides skill training, modern tools, and collateral-free loans up to Rs 3 lakh at concessional rates. First scheme for artisans in 40 years. पारंपरिक कारीगरों के लिए नई योजना। प्रशिक्षण, आधुनिक उपकरण, 3 लाख तक का लोन।
benefits: Skill training free, modern tool kit incentive Rs 15,000, collateral-free loan up to Rs 3 lakh at 5% interest rate (no processing fee). First tranche Rs 1 lakh, second Rs 2 lakh. मुफ्त प्रशिक्षण, 15,000 का टूलकिट, 3 लाख लोन 5% ब्याज पर।
skill_training: Skill training through DGT/State institutes - free of cost
loan_terms: Rs 1 lakh first tranche, Rs 2 lakh second tranche. Interest rate 5% (no processing fee). No collateral required.
how_to_apply: Apply at nearest bank branch or CSC. Also apply online at pmvishwakarma.gov.in. No documents needed except Aadhaar (self-declaration of craft). pmvishwakarma.gov.in पर ऑनलाइन जाएं या बैंक में आवेदन करें।

name: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
name_hi: पीएम सूर्य घर: मुफ्त बिजली योजना
description: Free rooftop solar electricity for poor households. Subsidy of Rs 30,000-70,000 for installing solar panels on roof. Generates up to 300 units free electricity per month. Surplus sold to DISCOM for extra income. For households with roof space — farmers, rural homes, any low-income family. छत पर सोलर पैनल, मुफ्त बिजली। 30,000-70,000 सब्सिडी। 300 यूनिट महीना मुफ्त।

eligibility.income_limit: Annual household income up to Rs 3 lakh (before May 2024 update)

benefits: Central subsidy Rs 30,000-70,000 depending on system size. Generates up to 300 units/month free electricity. Surplus power sold to grid for additional income. 30,000-70,000 सब्सिडी, 300 यूनिट महीना मुफ्त बिजली।
how_to_apply: Apply on national portal (surya.gov.in) or through DISCOM/bank. Empaneled vendor installs system. Subsidy credited to bank account after installation and verification. Surya.gov.in पर आवेदन करें।

name: PM Garib Kalyan Yojana
description: Free ration to 81 crore beneficiaries under Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY). Additional 5 kg foodgrains per person per month free on top of normal NFSA ration. Running continuously since April 2020. For NFSA cardholders — farmers, laborers, all poor families. 81 करोड़ लोगों को मुफ्त राशन। सामान्य राशन के ऊपर 5 किलो अतिरिक्त मुफ्त।

eligibility.condition: All NFSA (ration card) holders — over 81 crore people

benefits: 5 kg additional foodgrains per person per month FREE on top of normal ration. Rice/wheat at Rs 0-1/kg under PMGKAY. Total 10 kg free foodgrains per person/month for NFSA beneficiaries. NFSA कार्ड वालों को 5 किलो अतिरिक्त मुफ्त अनाज।
ration_under_pmgkay: 5 kg free foodgrains per person/month (in addition to normal NFSA ration)
allocation: Rice at Re 1/kg or Wheat at Re 1/kg (state varies)
how_to_apply: No separate application needed if you have NFSA/ration card. Free extra ration automatically credited at ration shop. Simply collect from ration dealer with your card. राशन कार्ड हो तो अपने आप मिल जाएगा।

name: PM Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
description: Affordable quality generic medicines from Jan Aushadhi Kendras. 18,646 Kendras across India with 2,110 medicines and 315 surgical items at 50-80% lower price than branded equivalents. No prescription needed to buy. For all citizens — farmers, laborers, anyone needing affordable medicines. जनऔषधि केंद्र से सस्ती दवाइयां। ब्रांडेड दवाओं से 50-80% सस्ती।
benefits: Medicines and surgical items at 50-80% cheaper than market rates. No prescription required. All essential medicines including diabetes, BP, heart, antibiotics, etc. available. 50-80% सस्ती दवाइयां।
product_basket: 2,110 medicines + 315 surgical items and medical consumables
documents_required: No documents needed to buy medicines
Doctor's prescription (optional but helps get exact generic name)
how_to_apply: No enrollment needed. Visit nearest Jan Aushadhi Kendra (find at janaushadhi.gov.in) and purchase medicines by generic name. Call 1800-180-1111 for store locator. janaushadhi.gov.in पर जाएं।

name: PM SVANidhi - Street Vendor
description: Collateral-free loan up to Rs 50,000 for street vendors to resume their business. No interest if repaid on time in first year. Digital transaction incentive Rs 50/month. For street vendors, hawkers, small entrepreneurs in markets. स्ट्रीट वेंडर के लिए 50,000 तक का लोन।
benefits: Collateral-free loan up to Rs 50,000. No interest if repaid on time in first year. Digital transaction incentive Rs 50/month for first year. बिना गारंटी 50,000 तक का लोन।
loan_terms: Rs 50,000 max, 12-month tenure, 0% interest on timely repayment
digital_incentive: Rs 50/month digital transaction reward for first year
documents_required: Vending certificate or local authority letter (self-declaration if not available)
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank branch or through Business Correspondent. Also apply on pm-svanidhi.nsdl.co.in. Check vendor list with local municipal authority. बैंक में आवेदन करें।

name: Ayushman Bharat PMJAY - Senior Citizens 70+
name_hi: आयुष्मान भारत पीएमजेएवाई - 70+ नागरिकों के लिए
description: Since September 2024, ALL citizens aged 70 years and above are eligible for Ayushman Bharat PMJAY, regardless of income, occupation, or social category. Rs 5 lakh/year coverage for hospitalization. For elderly farmers, laborers, anyone aged 70+. दादा-दादी के लिए आयुष्मान - बिना आय सीमा के।

eligibility.note: Since Sep 2024 — no income/occupation restriction for 70+ citizens

benefits: Rs 5 lakh/year health coverage for all citizens 70+ regardless of income. Cashless treatment at 25,000+ empanelled hospitals. Covers all pre-existing conditions from day 1. 70 वर्ष से अधिक सभी के लिए 5 लाख कवर।
documents_required: Existing Ayushman Card holders 70+: card already valid
how_to_apply: Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in or call 14555. Visit nearest CSC, bank, or empanelled hospital to get Ayushman Card. 14555 पर कॉल करें।
